metadata.label: chorus_one
metadata.name: Chorus One
metadata.description: Chorus One — institutional staking provider. Runs TON Pool, a public staking product based on whales_pool contract (audited by Spearbit). 20% pool fee, 10 TON minimum stake.

addresses.source: on-chain analysis: TONAPI name='Chorus One TON Pool', pool_type=chorus_one in result_nominators_cashflow
addresses.comment: Chorus One TON Pool 1 (main pool, ~4.9M TON, 2600+ delegators)

addresses.source: on-chain analysis: same deployer as Pool 1, same code_hash and pool parameters
on-chain analysis: deployed both Chorus One TON Pool contracts, collects pool fees
addresses.comment: Chorus One deployer and operator wallet

addresses.source: on-chain analysis: funded the Chorus One deployer wallet
